title: The Man Who Laughs
actors: Franz Höbling, Nora Gregor, Lucienne Delacroix
plot: France in the late 1600s, the son of a widowed lord is kidnapped by gypsies, who carve a permanent grin on the child's face. When the deformed boy grows up, he falls in love with a blind girl named Dea, and joins a touring company...
